[[Baron/Legends|Baron]] '''Sando''' of [[Vena]] was the son of Baroness [[Omnino]]. He was also part of her plan to defame the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and destabilize (and eventually take control of) the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Sando cooperated closely with [[Taxer Sundown]], Omnino's right-hand man on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], in order to transport [[Mantellian Savrip/Legends|Mantellian Savrips]] to Vena for delicacy meat, and also instituted a breeding program to raise them like cattle. With his last shipment, however, one of the creatures broke free, and killed him.
